title: Cookies: Website Memory
drDigitalIntro:
Cookies are small files websites store on your computer.
• They remember things like your cart, login, and preferences.
• Most are helpful, but some track you across the internet.
• If a cookie banner appears, it's fine to Decline.

steps.say: Go to weather.com — type it and press Enter. Many sites greet you with a cookie notice.
A cookie banner appeared at the bottom. You can Accept or Decline. Click Decline to say no to tracking.

drDigitalSuccess: You handled the cookie banner by declining. You're always allowed to say no to tracking cookies — the site still works.
drDigitalHint: Look at the dark bar across the bottom of the page and click the Decline button.
